Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Grand Hive]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Captain ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 28''' — The Grand Hive is the fortress of the last Iron King to mature over four centuries ago.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 39''' — The protagonist and Sola previously died at the Grand Hive.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 39''' — The Grand Hive is a moon-sized location that was previously attacked.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 41''' — The Grand Hive is the target of The Last Horizon's mission.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 41''' — The Grand Hive is a topic of discussion for the Captain and Sola.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 42''' — The Grand Hive is a massive structure that was struck by the narrator's astral tide.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 43''' — Ships burst from every opening in the Grand Hive.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 43''' — The Grand Hive's shields were destroyed by a shot from the Fallen Sword’s Aethertech weapon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 44''' — The Grand Hive was broken into debris.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 44''' — The characters are scanning the wreckage of the Grand Hive.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 45''' — The Grand Hive is a wreckage located outside the viewport.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 48''' — The Grand Hive consists of chunks that can be tied together.}}

== The Engineer ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 8''' — The Grand Hive is a group that moves toward specific locations in the Dornoth system.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 29''' — The Grand Hive is a massive, floating hunk of meat and metal that remains in the shadow of a planet.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 29''' — The Grand Hive is the remains of a moon-sized entity.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 39''' — The Grand Hive has wreckage in the system.}}

== The Knight ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 26''' — The Grand Hive is located in the Dornoth system.}}

== The Pilot ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 10''' — The Grand Hive is missing.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 10''' — The Grand Hive is a moon-sized chunk of flesh and metal.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 10''' — The Grand Hive stretches like an asteroid belt through the Lichborn system.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 10''' — The inner components of the Iron King�s Hive have been stolen.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 22''' — A Grand Hive is a type of Hive that has produced a King recently.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
